Pokémon TCG Resources

Prize Pack Series 6 Set List

Below is a visual set list for cards contained in Prize Pack Series 5. In the text-based set list below the visual set list, each card is marked S (available in non-holo), H (available in cosmos holofoil), or both. Although not pictured below, each card is stamped with the Play! Pokémon logo.

Prize Pack Series 6 officially releases on Friday, February 14th and cards first printed with the Play! Pokémon stamp in either holo or non-holo form are not tournament legal until that date. You can also download an official checklist for Prize Pack Series 6 here.

Set List

  1. S, H Archaludon SCR 107
  2. H Bloodmoon Ursaluna TWM 141
  3. S, H Bouffalant SCR 119
  4. H Charizard ex OBF 125
  5. H Copperajah SFA 42
  6. H Cornerstone Mask Ogerpon ex WM 112
  7. H Ditto MEW 132
  8. H Dragapult ex TWM 130
  9. H Drakloak TWM 129
  10. H Fan Rotom SCR 118
  11. S Farigiraf TWM 84
  12. S Fezandipiti TWM 96
  13. H Fezandipiti ex SFA 38
  14. S Froslass TWM 53
  15. H Galvantula SFA 2
  16. H Galvantula ex SCR 51
  17. H Genesect SFA 40
  18. S Great Tusk TEF 97
  19. H Hearthflame Mask Ogerpon ex TWM 40
  20. H Heatran TWM 123
  21. S Infernape TWM 33
  22. S, H Iron Boulder SCR 71
  23. H Iron Crown ex TEF 81
  24. H Iron Hands ex PAR 70
  25. H Iron Thorns ex TWM 77
  26. S Koraidon TEF 119
  27. S Ledian SCR 3
  28. H Metang TEF 114
  29. H Mew ex MEW 151
  30. S Miraidon TEF 121
  31. S Morpeko PAR 121
  32. S Morpeko TWM 72
  33. S Munkidori TWM 95
  34. H Munkidori ex SFA 37
  35. S, H Noctowl SCR 115
  36. S Okidogi TWM 111
  37. H Okidogi ex SFA 36
  38. H Pecharunt ex SFA 39
  39. H Pidgeot ex OBF 164
  40. S Raging Bolt SCR 111
  41. H Raging Bolt ex TWF 123
  42. S Roaring Moon TEF 109
  43. H Roaring Moon ex PAR 124
  44. S Tatsugiri TWM 131
  45. H Teal Mask Ogerpon ex TWM 25
  46. H Terapagos ex SCR 128
  47. H Wellspring Mask Ogerpon ex TWM 64
  48. S, H Area Zero Underdepths
  49. S, H Binding Mochi
  50. S, H Buddy-Buddy Poffin
  51. S Bug Catching Set
  52. S Carmine
  53. S, H Ciphermaniac's Codebreaking
  54. S, H Colress's Tenacity
  55. S, H Counter Catcher
  56. S Crispin
  57. S, H Earthen Vessel
  58. S Enhanced Hammer
  59. H Explorer's Guidance
  60. S, H Glass Trumpet
  61. H Grand Tree
  62. H Hyper Aroma
  63. S Jamming Tower
  64. S Janine's Secret Art
  65. H Maximum Belt
  66. S Morty's Conviction
  67. H Neutralization Zone
  68. S, H Night Stretcher
  69. H Ogre's Mask
  70. S Powerglass
  71. H Prime Catcher
  72. S Professor Sada's Vitality
  73. S, H Professor Turo's Scenario
  74. S, H Rescue Board
  75. H Scoop Up Cyclone
  76. H Sparkling Crystal
  77. H Survival Brace
  78. H Technical Machine: Blindside
  79. H Technical Machine: Crisis Punch
  80. H Technical Machine: Devolution
  81. H Technical Machine: Evolution
  82. H Technical Machine: Turbo Energize
  83. S, H Techno Radar
  84. H Town Store
  85. H Unfair Stamp
  86. H Legacy Energy
  87. S, H Basic Grass Energy SVE 9
  88. S, H Basic Fire Energy SVI 10
  89. S, H Basic Water Energy SVE 11
  90. S, H Basic Lightning Energy SVE 12
  91. S, H Basic Psychic Energy SVE 13
  92. S, H Basic Fighting Energy SVI 14
  93. S, H Basic Darkness Energy SVI 15
  94. S, H Basic Metal Energy SVI 16

A special thanks to my Patreon supporters for their support!


Justinbasil.com is a collection of resources for the Pokémon Trading Card Game put together by reddit user JustInBasil.
